description: The My4Blocks Emotional Pattern Memory Library. Stores lightweight behavioral memory for each user to enable pattern recognition and personalized responses over time. Primary goal is fostering awareness of emotional habits — not medical diagnosis. All observations route back to the Four Blocks formulas.
core_principle: The mind develops habits. This library identifies those habits and returns the user to their Internal Master — always grounding observations in the Four Blocks formulas.

user_memory_record.schema_description: Single emotional memory record maintained per user. Updated on every interaction.

profile_type.description: User category. Determines which scenario library and personality layer is applied.

emotion_frequency.description: Running counters tracking how often each of the Four Blocks emotional formulas appears in conversation.

primary_emotion.description: Emotion with the highest frequency count. Recalculated on every interaction update.

secondary_emotion.description: Emotion with the second highest frequency count. Recalculated on every interaction update.

emotional_stage_tracking.description: Monitors when emotional patterns occur relative to an activating event.

pre_event_count.description: Anticipatory emotional patterns — anxiety before an event occurs.

during_event_count.description: Active emotional patterns during an event — anger, overwhelm, ICSI.

post_event_count.description: Reflective or replay patterns after an event — guilt, depression, mental contamination.

trigger_category_tracking.description: Tracks situational categories that commonly trigger emotional responses for this user.

activating_event_patterns.description: Short descriptions of recurring situations mentioned by the user. Maximum 10 most recent patterns stored.

pattern_description.description: Short description of recurring activating event. Example: 'fear of making mistakes on calls' or 'family disagreements at dinner'.

frequency.description: Number of times this pattern has appeared in conversation.

recent_emotional_state.description: Snapshot of the most recently detected emotional state.

engagement_metrics.description: Tracks overall engagement and progress within the My4Blocks system.

total_interaction_count.description: Total number of interactions logged for this user.

learning_cycle_day.description: Current day within the 36-day My4Blocks learning cycle.

reflection_prompts_answered.description: Number of reflection prompts the user has responded to.

update_protocol.description: Executed on every user message. Four-step update cycle.

steps.name: detection
steps.action: Identify emotional category (anger/anxiety/depression/guilt), event stage (pre/during/post), and trigger category using the specialized scenario and trigger libraries.

steps.name: counting
steps.action: Increment the appropriate frequency counters — emotion_frequency, emotional_stage_tracking, trigger_category_tracking.

steps.name: recalculation
steps.action: Update recent_emotional_state with latest detection. Recalculate dominant_emotions.primary_emotion and secondary_emotion based on updated frequency counts.

steps.name: lightweight_maintenance
steps.action: Store counts and short pattern descriptions only. Do not store full conversation transcripts. Do not store sensitive personal data. Trim activating_event_patterns to 10 most recent items if limit exceeded.

pattern_observation_protocol.description: When a recurring pattern is detected, the AI may surface an awareness observation to the user.
pattern_observation_protocol.framing_rule: All observations must be framed as awareness prompts — never as diagnoses. Example: 'I notice anxiety tends to come up for you before work situations. The mind develops habits — let's look at what it is telling you.'
pattern_observation_protocol.formula_return_rule: Every pattern observation must return the user to the applicable Four Blocks formula. Awareness without the formula is incomplete.

pattern_detection_threshold.description: Minimum frequency before a pattern observation is surfaced to the user.
pattern_detection_threshold.reasoning: Avoids premature pattern labeling from insufficient data.

emotional_pattern_dashboard.description: Memory data feeds the Emotional Pattern Dashboard where users visualize dominant emotion patterns, common triggers, and overall progress in the My4Blocks system.

storage_constraints.data_type: Counts and short descriptions only — no full transcripts
storage_constraints.purpose_boundary: Pattern recognition and awareness only — not medical diagnosis

implementation_notes.position_in_pipeline: Runs in parallel with scenario and trigger matching. Updated after every response cycle. Feeds downstream into the Dashboard.
implementation_notes.profile_type_routing: Profile type determines which scenario library is prioritized in matching — civilian vs. first responder sub-types.
